rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Notice Of Taking Deposition And Subpoena; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof And Declrations Of Leopoldo Chanco And Steven Spaulding In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, April 7, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Non-party Rockwell Collins, Inc.¿s motion to quash plaintiffs¿ notice of taking deposition and subpoena is granted. A deposition subpoena must be personally served. (CCP § 2020.220(b)-(c).) The proof of service, submitted by both parties, shows that plaintiffs served the subpoena by mail. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Annual Update To Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs¿ Interrogatories From Defendant J.S. Guerin Company, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, April 7, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel the annual update to responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiff¿s interrogatories from defendant J.S. Guerin Company, Inc. will be heard on April 27, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. per plaintiff¿s notice filed March 23. = (220/HEK)
